messages.content:
Generate a stunning hero section design for a product website called 'NDHY AI Agent Team'. This is a platform where 1 human product manager works with 27 AI expert agents as a full product team.

Design requirements:
- Dark premium background with deep navy to black gradient
- Center: A glowing holographic organizational chart showing a human figure at the top connected to 27 AI agent nodes arranged in a beautiful radial network
- Each node has a subtle glow in different colors representing different expertise: blue for tech, green for design, purple for strategy, orange for operations
- Flowing light particles connecting the nodes, showing data/communication flow
- Top: Clean modern navigation bar with logo 'NDHY' and menu items
- Main headline in bold white: 'One Human. 27 AI Experts. Infinite Possibilities.'
- Subtitle: 'The world's first AI-native product organization'
- A prominent CTA button with gradient blue-purple
- Modern glassmorphism card elements floating in the background
- 4K quality, web design, ultra modern, cinematic lighting
- Style: Like Apple or Linear website hero sections
